attr.title: HillChord
attr.desc: A handheld harmony instrument. Play diatonic chords and scale notes with the gamepad, shape them with D-pad chord transformations, and layer reverb/delay/chorus, a looper, and a metronome.
attr.inst: Place your sample folders (one folder of per-pitch WAVs per timbre) in ROMs/Samples on the SD card. On first launch HillChord installs its Python deps (needs network once).
